author: Sarah M.
text: D&J completely transformed our back garden. Denis and Julia are professional, tidy, and always on time. The patio looks absolutely stunning. Couldn't recommend them more highly.

author: James T.
text: Had them install a new driveway and fence. Excellent quality work, very fair pricing, and they left the property spotless. Will definitely use them again.

author: Helen R.
text: Regular lawn maintenance for over a year now. Always show up when they say they will and the garden always looks great. Reliable, friendly and honest.

author: Mark B.
text: Sent a photo on WhatsApp and had a firm price within minutes. The hedge cutting and garden clearance was done the same week. Brilliant service.
